summary: The shipped default set of tool, harness, and scratch namespaces that contract ingestion must never touch. These are ungoverned by construction: they are never candidates for the governed set even if a governed_set selector would otherwise match them.

matching.rule: An entry with no glob metacharacter that ends in '/' (a bare directory name, e.g. '.claude/') matches that directory at ANY depth, so both '.claude/x.md' and 'tools/.claude/x.md' are ignored. An entry containing a glob metacharacter ('*', '?', '[') is a glob evaluated against the repo-relative path (e.g. '**/*.wip.md').

rule: A path matching any ignore-set namespace is ungoverned regardless of adoption or governed_set declarations. The ignore-set is the safety floor: it wins over the allowlist so scratchpads and other-harness docs (Claude, Codex, OpenCode, Gemini/Antigravity, PI, Cursor, and the .agents shared root) are never governed or ingested.
